scope: B8.1 class-balanced randomized-audit contract canary -- DESIGN red-team (before compute) + RESULT red-team (after canary). Development-only, NOT confirmatory, NOT validation, NO tag.

design_redteam.verdict: 3/3 MINOR_ISSUE, NO blockers, NO hard-stops -- canary authorized
design_redteam.lens_collider_fix_causality: SOUND. Dc=y0 is genuinely PRE-ASSIGNMENT (a CAUSE of Z; y0 _|_ C by the randomization -> covariate adjustment, NOT collider conditioning); the B8.1 null never touches Y (uses C,Dc,Block only) so the B8.0 (block,Y) collider is removed; h0=[Zs,cv] absorbs the linear C->Y prior main effect; (block,Dc) permutation = the exact registered randomization space, exactness survives subject-subsampling. PREDICTED (medium): a 2nd-order mean-T residual remains (permuting C with Y held fixed) -> prior_only safety leans on the studentized AND-gate; make prior_only<=3/50 the load-bearing screen + report mean-T-alone vs both-gate. [This prediction was CONFIRMED by the result -- see below.]
design_redteam.lens_provenance_isolation: CLEAN, non-circular. Certifier BLIND (arrays+table+hash only; no world/contract_intended/oracle/B7/router/observed_T); H3 schedule-adherence is a faithful PRE-REGISTRATION verification (verifies a KNOWN randomization, does NOT claim to discover confounding from observational data); null pure (within-(block,Dc) permutation, no fitted Y|Z or C|Z); alert = {estimable AND p_t<=0.025 AND p_z<=0.025 AND n_eligible>=20}. DISCLOSED (medium): H1/H2/H5 are non-discriminative by construction in the emulator (H2/H5 always pass) -> the canary exercises only H3(adherence)+H4(support)+D1(AUC secondary); read as an H3/H4 test, NOT a 5-gate validation. H3 zero-tolerance; _schedule_hash pins per-(block,Dc) COUNTS not per-trial assignment.
design_redteam.lens_world_coherence_screen: COHERENT. Ordering hard-stop SATISFIED (Block/Dc/C_table/hash fixed BEFORE any label/concept injection); Y-as-stratum hard-stop SATISFIED. All 12 worlds causally coherent. POS-ABSORPTION regression does NOT materialize (4-seed check: B8.1 and B8.0 give near-identical near-zero T_obs; the (block,Dc) stratifier does not weaken the concept; weak POS is a pre-existing studentized-gate/substrate property). FOLDED IN (medium): merge verdict-tree now requires null_ok; any violation alert is a HARD-STOP (contract-first guarantees 0), not tolerated up to 3.

accounting_isolation.detail: Recomputed all 600 rows from the 12 raw shards: every per-world state count, median, invalid-reason breakdown, auc_le_tau, provenance_only_refused, and section-E two-gate counts reproduce with 0 mismatches; states sum 50/world; all 12 sha256 match; 0 worker errors. Per-record ALERT == both-gate == recorded b8_alert == {ninv<=40 AND p_t<=.025 AND p_z<=.025 AND n_eligible>=20} = 0/600 mismatch (all computed-T cohorts had n_eligible=30, n_exact_invalid=0). Seeds 420e6+world_idx*1e6+cohort, all 600 unique, ZERO overlap with B8.0/B7/B6/R1/P3/B5/smoke; p on k/201. Isolation clean: certifier/null take arrays+table+hash only, no Y arg in null, stratifier is Dc=pre-assignment y0 NOT Yq; world/oracle/B7 appear ONLY in docstrings; contract_intended/has_concept scoring-only. T+studentize+estimability+alert byte-identical to B8.0 except the intended single causal change (+ a cosmetic state-string ternary reformat, no logic change). Merge verdict tree correct.
notes: 'byte-unchanged' scoped to the T statistic + studentized/estimability/min_confirm gates (verified byte-identical); the state-string assignment was reformatted equivalently (not literally every line).
prior_only decision-level control rests ENTIRELY on the studentized AND-gate (mean-T gate itself NOT recalibrated).
CONTRACT_random_label 2/50 exceeds the pre-registered preferred <=1/50 (non-blocking; folds into null_ok<=3).

science.verdict: MINOR_ISSUE -- decision-level screen genuinely MET, but the auto-label 'STRONG'/'collider FIXED' is OVER-CLAIMED; corrected in this package.
science.honest_verdict_label: MEETS-PRE-REGISTERED-TARGETS-ON-EMULATOR (decision-level), NOT STRONG -- collider CONTROLLED by the conservative studentized AND-gate, not FIXED (mean-T residual intact 5/50, binom vs 0.025 p=0.008); the 5->2 both-gate drop is CI-overlapping (Fisher p=0.22); aggregate null flat (7->6/200); POS modest (16%) and statistically unchanged vs B8.0 (p=0.36), separating only from the pooled floor. Development-only, single-seed, emulator.

findings.detail: prior_only mean-T-alone residual INTACT at 5/50 (= B8.0's both-gate 5/50; binom vs 0.025 p=0.0081). The both-gate fell to 2/50 ONLY because the studentized gate did not co-fire; CI [0.005,0.137] OVERLAPS B8.0 [0.033,0.218], Fisher 5->2 p=0.22 (not decisive at n=50). Masking imperfect: 2 of 3 studentized fires on prior_only coincide with mean-T fires (~6.7x over independence), so the residual leaks into the 2 alerts.
pooled decision-level null 7/200 (B8.0) -> 6/200 (B8.1); balanced 0->1 and random_label 1->2 got WORSE; only prior_only moved = redistribution within noise, NOT family-wide tightening.

findings.point: POS ABOVE-FLOOR IS FLOOR-DEPENDENT + MODEST + UNCHANGED
findings.detail: POS 8/50 separates from the POOLED null (6/200, p=0.0017, non-overlapping) but only marginally from the worst single null prior_only 2/50 (one-sided p=0.046, CIs overlap) and NOT from prior_only's mean-T floor 5/50 (p=0.28). POS 4->8 vs B8.0 is within noise (Fisher p=0.36) -- power NOT demonstrably higher than B8.0. 16% weak absolutely (84% miss).

findings.point: DECISION-LEVEL CONTROL IS MASKING-DEPENDENT + SINGLE-SEED FRAGILE
findings.detail: on prior_only, 2 of 3 studentized fires coincide with mean-T fires (~6.7x over independence); a different seed / scale-up could raise the both-gate count. Safety on prior worlds leans on the studentized AND-gate, not a recalibrated statistic.

all violations 0-alert + 50/50 refused is TRUE BY CONSTRUCTION (schedule deviation -> H3 fires -> contract-first refuses before T). The GENUINE contribution is only that AUC 0.53 MISSES the quiet confound while H3 (provenance) catches it -- the stress-gap closure. quiet_cov_plus_concept carries a real concept (same deg=25 rotate as POS) that WOULD alert if the contract passed -> contract-first refusal is a real safety property. Honestly framed.
cov_plus_prior 1/50 (= B8.0 1/50) genuinely retained, not regressed.

net: B8.1 MEETS the pre-registered decision-level targets on the emulator (all nulls controlled, mixed retained, violations refused with 0 alerts + quiet stress-gap closed via provenance, POS>=5) -- but this is a MODEST, MASKING-DEPENDENT positive, NOT a 'strong' result and NOT a statistic-level collider fix: the prior-collider's mean-T signature is intact (5/50), decision-level control leans on the conservative studentized AND-gate, the aggregate null rate is flat vs B8.0, and POS is statistically unchanged vs B8.0. Emulator (not validation), single base seed, n=50. NO tag.
